neighborhoods.name: Mid-Strip
neighborhoods.reason: The best base for solo travelers — central, walkable, and steps from the major casinos and shows.

neighborhoods.name: South Strip
neighborhoods.reason: Budget-friendly rooms at Excalibur and Luxor with easy Strip access — value for solo trips.

neighborhoods.name: Fremont Street (Downtown)
neighborhoods.reason: Cheaper, more local, and walkable — vintage casinos and a lively pedestrian canopy.

neighborhoods.name: The Arts District
neighborhoods.reason: Off-Strip and low-key — breweries, galleries, and independent restaurants for a quieter night.
